message: When I woke up, Kagami was standing in front of my bed, already wearing her uniform.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahh... It's morning."

name: Kagami
message: "That's right. It's morning. What an astute observation."

name: Yuki
message: "I went to school yesterday, so I guess I can take today off."

name: Kagami
message: "As if!"

name: Kagami
message: "Jeez, you're always trying to skip school. Let's go."

name: Yuki
message: "Have fun at school."
I waved her goodbye and put on the best smile I could muster.

name: Kagami
message: "You're coming too!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "Why are you making that shocked face? Come on, get ready. You can't go to school in your pajamas."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. There are lots of things you can do in your pajamas. Like sleeping, or sleeping, or laying around, or sleeping. You could even sleep in them!"

name: Kagami
message: "You're going to school!"
Kagami grabbed my collar and pulled me out of bed.

name: Yuki
message: "Agghh, it hurts."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Whoooaa, there's so much today. Haahmmm..."
Tsukasa was clinging to my leg for some reason, so she was pulled out from under the sheets too.

name: Kagami
message: "Ts-Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I caught one. I caught one. It's my first time, but I got one... Ahaha haammnn..."

name: Kagami
message: "No, I think you're the one who got caught. Jeez, I wonder what kind of dream she's having."

name: Tsukasa
message: "This next one... Slowly... Ha, mmm..."

name: Kagami
message: "R-Really, what kind of dream is that?"

name: Yuki
message: "L-Let's put that aside for a second, Kagami-san. You're kinda crushing my windpipe."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, sorry."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa, haa, ugh. I thought I was gonna suffocate."

name: Kagami
message: "You're exaggerating."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not! With you pulling on my collar and Tsukasa holding onto my legs like a lead weight, that was really dangerous."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez. Kagami-san, are you trying to kill me?"

name: Kagami
message: "That's... not it."

name: Yuki
message: "What's with the pause?!"
After all that, I was obviously awake.

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's so soft... It looks so good with the fat on the edges like that."
Tsukasa was still rubbing her cheek against my leg and babbling.

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's rude. My legs aren't that fat."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Thank you for this meal. Ahm."

name: Yuki
message: "Oww!"
Tsukasa suddenly bit into my leg.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Mmm. It's really good."

name: Kagami
message: "It sounds like it's nice and fat. Isn't that great?"

name: Yuki
message: "How long must you two torture me before you're satisfied? For crying out loud!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahh!"
I gave Tsukasa a good thump on the head.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ow, ow, ow. H-Huh? Where did all the fat yukkuris go?"
Tsukasa rubbed her head and tried to clear her eyes.

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, you're so rude. My legs are as slender as can be."

name: Kagami
message: "Yes, yes, we know. Anyway, Tsukasa is up now, so get ready for school."

name: Yuki
message: "But I'm still sleepy. Tsukasa, you wanna stay home today too, don't you?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm... But I'm already pretty dumb, so I shouldn't skip any more classes."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, you're quite the dummy!"

name: Kagami
message: "Don't say that about Tsukasa!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm joking. Her grades aren't that bad. They're perfectly average."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That's not true. My grades aren't very good, so I can't stay and skip school with you."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay. Understood. I'll sleep enough for the both of us, so you can go to school without worrying!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Thanks, Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "You. Are. Coming. Too! Got it?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Urbububur... Kagami-shan, doh't pull ohn my sheeks."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kagami-san, good morning."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, Takashima-san, you're awake?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. I've already made breakfast and packed some lunches."

name: Kagami
message: "Not just breakfast, but lunch too?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. I packed lunchboxes for everyone."

name: Zakuro
message: "I made this for you, so would you take it with you when you go to school?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ugh. If you say it like that..."

name: Zakuro
message: "And I was thinking, it would be a lot more fun if we all walked to school together. Right, Kagami-san?"

name: Kagami
message: "Ugh. It's not that it wouldn't be fun. I-I just..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, yes. Anyway, Yuki-sama and Tsukasa-san, would you two please get dressed? I'm going to hang the mattress out to dry today."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well then, we're off."

name: Yuki
message: "Yep, have a nice day."

name: Kagami
message: "You haven't forgotten anything, right? Do you have your handkerchief? Make sure you look both ways when you cross the street."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I'll be fine, Onee-chan. I'm not a child anymore."

name: Kagami
message: "I know, I know, but I can't help but worry. Okay, let's go."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, do your best out there!"

name: Kagami
message: "Hey! You're so damn stubborn!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ow, ow, ow. What was that for? It was just a joke."

name: Kagami
message: "I didn't find it funny at all. Jeez."

name: Zakuro
message: "Let's hurry. At this rate, we really are going to be late."
It wasn't very far. The school was just a few stations down the line, in Suginomiya.
I gazed at the same scenery as always through the glass of this window: our town.
The scenery is just like any other.
The same things happen as anywhere else.
And...
The same sort of people live here as in any other city.
Long, long before we were born, this city was called a "new town."
This city probably represented some kind of dream to the people who called it that.
Of course, it's not such a bad city to live in. Even I like this city.
Old scenery...
By this point, though, this cityscape is far from new.
But maybe that makes it all the more fitting to call it a "new town."
Nowadays, we don't add "new" to the name of anything. That trend has long since passed.
That's too old-fashioned.
Here, the same scenery continues into the distance, just like anywhere else.
That scenery continues forever without any change or variation.

name: Kagami
message: "What are you looking at?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing. I was just thinking that the view from this window doesn't change at all."

name: Kagami
message: "It doesn't?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, well... Yeah, this cityscape really isn't any different from how it was long before we were born."

name: Kagami
message: "It has changed, though. Look, those buildings weren't there two years ago."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, and that house is new too."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I guess so."
Scenery that never changes.
Day after day.
But it actually did change. Piece by piece.
But despite that, it felt like it hadn't changed at all.
People once called this aged scenery a "new city."
It was the kind of scenery that was neither new nor old.
"Sure, that's fine. You probably can't go today, but there shouldn't be a problem if you want to go in a few days."

name: Kagami
message: "Really? Thank you so much, Miu."

name: Miu
message: "What do you mean? It's not a big deal."

name: Kagami
message: "It looks like they're going to give us permission, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? For what?"

name: Kagami
message: "What do you mean, for what? You said we were going to search the night sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh. The Summer Triangle."

name: Miu
message: "I didn't think you were interested in astronomy, Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, who are you?"

name: Kagami
message: "You chowderhead!"

name: Kagami
message: "She's Miu! Why can't you even remember the names of the girls in your class?"

name: Miu
message: "Oh, it's fine. I haven't really talked to Minakami-san that much."

name: Yuki
message: "But anyway, sorry about this. We're not even in the club and we're using your stuff."

name: Miu
message: "No problem. It's not really that big of a deal, anyway."

name: Miu
message: "It's the time of year when the rain lets up, so you can see the summer sky clearly. I understand why you want to look at the stars, Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... Th-That's right."
There was no way I could tell her that we were looking for the place where the sky begins and ends.

name: Miu
message: "You said you were going to look at the Summer Triangle, right? The stars aren't hard to find, but you should take this."

name: Yuki
message: "What's this?"

name: Miu
message: "A planisphere. And here's a compass. With these, you can figure out the position of the stars."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wow. How do you use these?"

name: Miu
message: "First, use the compass to make sure you're facing the right direction. This is north, so put it like this."

name: Miu
message: "Then line up the planisphere with the direction. Then input the time and date."

name: Miu
message: "For instance, today is July 16th, and let's say it's eight o'clock. Like this. And it's based on Akashi, so let's change the location to Tokyo, and..."

name: Miu
message: "If you do this, you can see tonight's sky at eight o'clock."

name: Yuki
message: "Wow. That's really convenient."

name: Miu
message: "It's really fun if you also have a telescope. Want me to lend you one?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, we'll be fine."

name: Miu
message: "Well, if you want one, just ask and I can give you one. A refracting telescope would be easy to use and really interesting."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... Thanks for all of this."

name: Miu
message: "Oh, it's fine. It's really no problem at all. I learned it from our advisor when the club did it. Well, tests are over, and now that summer is starting, the sky is going to be beautiful, so I'm sure you'll be okay."

name: Miu
message: "But I don't think you can go up there tonight."
Well, now we could look at the night sky from the school roof. That was a relief.
Classes that day ended without incident.
Thursday's sky.
A sky no different than usual.
Class came to an end as I was thinking about the sky.

name: Kagami
message: "Why are you spacing out?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Kagami."

name: Kagami
message: "Wait, didn't you hear what I was saying?"

name: Yuki
message: "You were saying something?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Right, Onee-chan and I have to go to our clubs today, so you and Takashima-san should go home without us."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah, we haven't been setting a good example for the underclassmen by skipping out on club activites so much."

name: Yuki
message: "Underclassmen?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. Yokoyama-kun's little sister, Yasuko-chan, got mad at me and said I was slacking off."

name: Yuki
message: "Yokoyama-kun? Who's that?"

name: Kagami
message: "You really don't remember your classmates at all. He's a boy in the same class as you."

name: Yuki
message: "Is he really? You see, I really can't remember boys' faces, or rather, I don't want to remember them."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Do you hate boys, Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I guess so. Guys are all disgusting."

name: Kagami
message: "Hmm. So there are things we can agree on."

name: Yuki
message: "Who am I agreeing with?"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, uh, nothing. A-Anyway!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, ma'am. I'll get going."

name: Tsukasa
message: "See you."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... We have to go home without them, huh?"
I got the feeling that wouldn't be so bad, but I packed up my stuff and headed up to the roof.
Classes had ended and the sun was starting to set.
Normally, around this time, a cool breeze would start blowing through my usual spot. It would be nice to sit under the sky and read until it got dark.
The roof is my favorite place.
There's a nice shady spot with a pleasant breeze, even in the middle of the summer.

name: Yuki
message: "Now then, what should I read?"
I'm the type to be reading a bunch of books at once. I can't just read one book at a time.
I'm usually in the middle of about ten books. At worst, that number rises to around twenty.
So sometimes I forgot about a book I was in the middle of reading.
I've unearthed plenty of books half a year later and rushed to read them from the beginning again.
Let's see. This should be good.
I laid back and stretched out.

name: Yuki
message: "Whaaa―!! Who are you?"

name: "I'm Otonashi Ayana. It has been some time."
message: Ayana
"I'm Otonashi Ayana.

name: Ayana
message: It has been some time."

name: Yuki
message: "Otonashi Ayana-san?"

name: Ayana
message: "Quite some time. I didn't think we would meet in this kind of place."

name: Yuki
message: "Me either. I didn't think there was anyone but me up here on the roof."

name: Ayana
message: "Heh. So this is the roof."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? Of course it's the roof."

name: Ayana
message: "Right. By roof, you mean a place where you can see the sky."

name: Yuki
message: "But we can see the sky."

name: Ayana
message: "'and if you're not good directly,' she added, 'I'll put you through into Looking-glass House. How would you like THAT?'"

name: Ayana
message: "'Now, if you'll only attend, Kitty, and not talk so much, I'll tell you all my ideas about Looking-glass House.'"

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What's that?"

name: Ayana
message: "The book I'm reading."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? A book?"

name: Ayana
message: "The brain is wider than the sky."

name: Ayana
message: "For, put them side by side, the one the other will include..."

name: Ayana
message: "With ease, and you beside."

name: Ayana
message: "The brain is deeper than the sea."

name: Ayana
message: "For, hold them, blue to blue, the one the other will absorb..."

name: Ayana
message: "As sponges, buckets do."

name: Ayana
message: "The brain is just the weight of God."

name: Ayana
message: "For, lift them, pound for pound..."

name: Ayana
message: "And they will differ, if they do..."

name: Ayana
message: "As syllable from sound."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? That's from something else, isn't it?"

name: Ayana
message: "The first one was from Through the Looking-Glass."

name: Yuki
message: "And the other one was..."
Ayana-san pointed at the book I was holding.
A poetry anthology.
The author was Emily Dickinson.
She wrote anonymously during her life, leaving behind over 1,700 poems. By the way, it's said that the poem Ayana quoted was written around the year 1862.

name: Yuki
message: "You really know her well. Dickinson is pretty old, too."

name: Ayana
message: "Do you like that poem?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, yeah, I like it."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."
What kind of response is that?
She's the one who asked about it.
Jeez.
Putting that aside...

name: Yuki
message: "Um... Ayana-san?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes?"

name: Yuki
message: "I can see your panties if you stand over me like that."

name: Ayana
message: "That's true."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if we're both girls, that's not very modest, is it?"

name: Ayana
message: "That's true. I understand what you mean."
Yet she wasn't about to move.
She didn't understand at all...

name: Yuki
message: "Anyway, why are you up here at this hour?"

name: Ayana
message: "I came to see."

name: Yuki
message: "See what? The sky?"

name: Ayana
message: "No. The entire world."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "What do you think of the scenery you can see from this rooftop?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't think anything of it. You can just see the city, I guess."

name: Ayana
message: "You can see the city. Because this is the rooftop, you can see the sky, and you can see the city."

name: Ayana
message: "What you can see is sky and city."

name: Ayana
message: "You can't see the city that lies beyond that, or what lies even further beyond that still."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I guess so."

name: Ayana
message: "Heheh. You can't see beyond that."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What are you trying to say?"

name: Ayana
message: "I'd like to ask you something. What if you could know what lies beyond the scenery you see, and beyond that still, and still further beyond that? The endless succession of beyonds."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Uh, Otonashi Ayana-san, are you..."
I wondered if she was talking about the same stuff as Takashima-san.
I wasn't really sure what she was talking about, but it was probably some religious thing, or else some kind of pretentious wordplay.

name: Ayana
message: "Heheh. You just thought I was weird."

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well, yeah. Anyone would think that if they heard you talking like that."

name: Ayana
message: "Ah... The sky got faster."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? The sky?"
The sky had been blue until just now, but before I knew it, the sun had dyed the world with shades of red.
Otonashi-san said it had gotten faster. And to me, too, it really did look like it was being fast-forwarded for a moment there.
But that was probably just my memory being faulty.
Since there's no way that could happen.

name: Yuki
message: "You're right. The sun is already starting to set."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. It's already evening."

name: Yuki
message: "I guess I can't read anymore. It's too dark."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, so it couldn't hurt to look over that way."

name: Yuki
message: "Where?"
While saying that, Otonashi-san pointed at Building C.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Is that Takashima-san?"

name: Ayana
message: "She is trying to drop a stuffed doll."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? But the Summer Triangle still hasn't appeared."

name: Ayana
message: "The Summer Triangle?"

name: Yuki
message: "I heard that was a ritual to find the place to return to the sky, and that the ritual needed the Summer Triangle to be visible."

name: Ayana
message: "So that's what you heard."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's what I heard. Is that wrong?"

name: Ayana
message: "If that is what you heard, then I think it is correct."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"
The stuffed toy fell from Takashima's hand, released into the air.
For a second, I thought it would fly up, but then it started dropping, accelerating, disappearing toward the ground.

name: Yuki
message: "Why would she drop it from Building C right at this kind of time?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? What's that all of a sudden?"

name: Ayana
message: "The time at which Takashima Zakuro-san dropped the doll from the rooftop."

name: Yuki
message: "I-Is that right?"
What's all this? I suppose it's true that today the Summer Triangle was supposed to rise in the eastern sky at around this time.
But you still couldn't see it because of the bright light of the sun.
Why did she drop it so early?

name: Ayana
message: "A place that is not of this world in a place that is not of this soul. That act is being reflected."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? A place that's not of this world? A place that's not of this soul? Wh-What's that?"

name: Ayana
message: "Something that, even if it is not necessary in this world, is probably necessary in another."

name: Ayana
message: "This act is reflected in a different July 16th, 2012 at 5:58 PM."

name: Ayana
message: "A singular soul lies within an infinite sea of souls, even as it looks upon a singular scene."

name: Ayana
message: "The scene we call falling off the roof..."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Uh, Ayana-san, do you know about what Takashima-san is doing, the local legend, and all the rest of that?"

name: Ayana
message: "The local legend?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, they say that in this world, there is a girl who is the world itself, and she's the one that meets the girl of the sky."

name: Ayana
message: "A girl who is the world itself..."

name: Yuki
message: "You've heard of it, haven't you?"

name: Ayana
message: "I have not. All I know is..."

name: Yuki
message: "All you know is?"

name: Ayana
message: "For, put them side by side, the one the other will include. With ease, and you beside."

name: Yuki
message: "That's just Dickinson's poem."

name: Ayana
message: "That's right."
"That's right"? What did that mean?
As Otonashi-san spoke, I turned to Building C again. Takashima-san wasn't there.

name: Yuki
message: "T-Takashima-san is gone, but..."

name: Ayana
message: "Don't worry. She went down the stairs."

name: Yuki
message: "She did?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. She went down the normal way."
For some reason I couldn't quite comprehend, her words actually scared me.
I didn't understand the purpose behind it, but my gut told me that the act of dropping the doll was actually a terrifying, dreadful sort of ritual.

name: Zakuro
message: "Is that so? Thank you very much."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Good work, Onee-chan."

name: Kagami
message: "You too. After talking to Miu, I went to talk to their advisor directly."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. I actually wanted to look at the night sky, anyway."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I don't know anything about the legends of this city, but I'm kind of interested in the summer sky."

name: Kagami
message: "I also asked if we could borrow a telescope."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. Takashima-san might not need it to look for the local legend, but I want to be able to look at the night sky properly."

name: Kagami
message: "Then we need binoculars too, don't we?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, do we?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah. I think it would be better to have some. It's way easier to look around at different places with binoculars than with a telescope."

name: Tsukasa
message: "I see. Then let's ask if we can borrow a pair."

name: Kagami
message: "Let's do it."

name: Yuki
message: "So when can we use the rooftop?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um... they said Saturday."

name: Kagami
message: "It looks like we can't go tomorrow."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's not a problem."
Takashima-san was acting perfectly normal.
I wanted to ask about what had happened today, but for some reason, I couldn't.
That scene I'd seen before, of her dropping the stuffed toy from the rooftop...
That was a method of finding the sky's beginning and end.
That's what I had heard.
But for some reason, I'd begun to feel uneasy about it.
I'm not sure why, either.
The girl who is the world itself... and the girl of the sky.
I wonder what those words meant.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry for keeping you waiting, Yuki-sama."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
When I got into the bathtub, I heard Takashima-san's voice.

name: Kagami
message: "Wait, you're really going in?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Of course I am. Have you gotten cold feet?"

name: Kagami
message: "Of course not! It doesn't really bother me, since we're all girls!"
Wh-What was that? Is someone... making noise in the changing room.
Even though last time they just barged in without thinking about it.

name: Kagami
message: "S-Sorry for taking so long, Yuki."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry to keep you waiting."

name: Yuki
message: "What the..."
What...
What on Earth?

name: Zakuro
message: "We came to help wash your body today."

name: Yuki
message: "Why are you naked?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, that's a strange thing to ask. Shouldn't one be naked when bathing?"

name: Yuki
message: "B-But last time you were wearing a swimsuit..."

name: Kagami
message: "L-Like she said, today we came to take a bath with you instead of just washing your back."

name: Yuki
message: "I-I see what you mean..."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-There's nothing weird about it. We're all girls, after all."

name: Yuki
message: "I-I don't think there's anything weird about it."
I couldn't help but wonder why Kagami's face was so red.

name: Zakuro
message: "Today we're bathing together, so the places we shall wash are not limited to your back. Today, I shall wash your front."

name: Yuki
message: "L-Like I said, I can wash my front myself!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I can't help?"

name: Yuki
message: "O-Of course not!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? It's important to have an equitable division of labor."

name: Yuki
message: "Stop saying nonsense like that. I said no."

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "Now then, I'll get started washing."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey! Why are you in front of me?!"

name: Kagami
message: "Like I was saying, I'll wash your body..."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um, Kagami. Didn't you hear what I said?"

name: Kagami
message: "What do you mean? I'm saying I want to do it, so it's fine."
What kind of crappy logic is that?

name: Zakuro
message: "Kagami-san, th-that's..."

name: Kagami
message: "What? Takashima-san, you're the maid, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yes, I am, but..."

name: Kagami
message: "I was thinking, in this house we're each playing our character roles, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yes..."

name: Kagami
message: "So, if I'm the childhood friend, I should say things like this."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, you could interpret it like that, but fundamentally the childhood friend is supposed to be more easy-going."

name: Kagami
message: "Sure, sure. Anyway, I'll start the shower."
I wanted to tell them I'd already finished washing, but I was at a loss for words given the unexpected situation.

name: Kagami
message: "W-Well... I'll, uh, wash your front."
If she kept acting really embarrassed as she did it, she was going to make me embarrassed too.

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um... Kagami."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What? Th-There's nothing weird about this! We're both girls, and we're childhood friends!"
No, even if we're both girls and childhood friends, this is still weird. And besides that...

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You know... Your hand is trembling for some reason, Kagami."

name: Kagami
message: "I-It's not trembling! I'm excited because soon I'll be fighting in a great battle."

name: Yuki
message: "I-I see."
It was a bit weird having her wash my front while she was so "excited."
Kagami touched my shoulder, lathering it with soap as if she was caressing it.

name: Yuki
message: "Mmm, haa, ooh."

name: Kagami
message: "W-Would you please stop making weird noises like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "I can't really stop. It tickles."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-Th-Th-Then you'll just have to sit and bear it. Jeez."
Kagami averted her gaze and moved the sponge over my neck, shoulders, and chest.

name: Kagami
message: "Is this soft part I'm feeling... your chest?"

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well, yes, but..."

name: Kagami
message: "You know, your chest is really big."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Uh, could you please not say that so frankly. It's embarrassing."
Kagami's gaze flitted back and forth over my body.
Urgh. I'm gonna die of embarrassment.

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, uh... I think I'd actually rather wash myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's no good. Please allow me, Yuki-sama. I'll make every last corner of your body spotless."
Rub, rub, rub.
I felt something soft rubbing on my back.

name: Yuki
message: "Um, what's this? A soft sponge?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It's a specially made sponge. Does it feel good?"
Rub, rub, rub.

name: Yuki
message: "I-I kind of have a bad feeling about this."

name: Zakuro
message: "Doesn't it feel good?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... It does feel good, I guess."

name: Zakuro
message: "Is that right? If you like it, then that's all that matters. It's a good thing I studied that manga."
What was that supposed to mean?!
That's weird! Why would you study how to wash someone's body?!
Um, first off, she was gently embracing me with both arms, and there was no sponge in either of her hands, so...
Rub, rub, rub, rub...
Something felt soft and supple.
Which means...
She's probably just playing around, but...
Right, this is definitely how girls who are friends act around each other. They poke each other's breasts or flip each other's skirts. Surely this isn't any different from that, but...
Uhh...
It felt like my heart was beating strangely quickly, as if my body was heating up.

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oooh."
Somehow I took my mind off it. I took my mind off the frighteningly seductive, supple charms assaulting my back.

name: Kagami
message: "Y-Yuki, uh, could you open your legs a little more? I can't wash you like that."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? Wait, what?!"
A blushing Kagami was right in front of me. Why was she breathing so hard?
D-Don't make that face at me.
Calm down. It's just Kagami, right? Isn't she your childhood friend? Isn't she also a girl?
But even if she was a girl, when she made that face... my heart lurched.

name: Kagami
message: "Uh, it might hurt if I use a sponge, so I'll do it with my finger."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?! Wait, wh-where are you touching me, Kagami?!"
My voice almost cracked.

name: Kagami
message: "U-Um, y-your very precious place."

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You don't have to say it out loud. Would you please move your hand?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-I don't want to."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-Why not?!"

name: Kagami
message: "B-Because it's not fair if only Takashima-san gets to touch you."
Wh-What kind of reason is that?

name: Kagami
message: "I'll be gentle, okay?"
Aaahhh! Someone save me! My chastity is in danger! Someone!

name: Tsukasa
message: "E-Excuse me."
Good timing, Tsukasa! You came to rescue me.

name: Yuki
message: "Wha―pshhff!"
Wh-Why is she naked too?!

name: Kagami
message: "Wait, Tsukasa! Why are you naked too?! You brought a swimsuit, didn't you?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Y-Yes, but when I put it on, it felt a little childish. I thought you'd laugh at me."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You were all getting in the bath, so I was worried about what I should do. I didn't want to bathe alone afterwards, so..."

name: Kagami
message: "So you found the guts to come in naked."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Speaking of that, you two aren't wearing swimsuits either. What happened?"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You said you were gonna put on swimsuits and wash her back."

name: Kagami
message: "U-Um, you see..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "And that's not soap in Takashima-san's hand."

name: Tsukasa
message: "What's that gooey liquid?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
I looked at what Takashima-san had in her hand.
I'd thought it was too slippery, even if she was lathering it up. What she'd been rubbing on me wasn't soap, rather it was lotion.

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You two..."

name: Zakuro
message: "A-Ahaha."

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Um, Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Quit fucking around! Get out, all of you!"
